# OSI Tobacco

> Stark County's premier walk-in cigar humidor and Diamond Crown lounge, with over 2,600 facings from the world's finest brands.

## Business facts
- Business: OSI Tobacco
- Location: Canton, OH
- Phone: (234) 214-0868
- Service area: Canton, OH, Stark County, OH
- Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday: 11:00-22:00 | Friday, Saturday: 11:00-23:30 | Sunday: 12:00-18:00

## Services / offerings
- JC Newman
- Davidoff
- Arturo Fuente
- Meerapfel
- Cohiba
- Padrón
- Ashton
- Oliva
- Liga Privada
- Alec Bradley
- Rocky Patel
- Punch
- Ferio Tego
- Montecristo
- Perdomo
- Foundation
